data.content: All 11 tests pass. Now let me perform a systematic mutation analysis — I'll introduce specific small mutations one at a time and check if any test catches them.

arguments.command:
cd /tmp/sv-824f98b60fea4c9b9575bc9a9855c57f && cat PricingEngine/DiscountCalculator.cs > /tmp/original.cs

# Script to test mutations
run_mutation() {
  local desc="$1"
  local sed_cmd="$2"
  
  cp /tmp/original.cs PricingEngine/DiscountCalculator.cs
  sed -i "$sed_cmd" PricingEngine/DiscountCalculator.cs
  result=$(cd PricingEngine.Tests && dotnet test --verbosity quiet --no-restore 2>&1 | tail -1)
  if echo "$result" | grep -q "Failed:     0"; then
    echo "SURVIVED  | $desc"
  else
    echo "KILLED    | $desc"
  fi
}

echo "=== CalculateDiscount mutations ==="
run_mutation "M1:  >= 1000 → > 1000  (off-by-one at top tier)" \
  's/orderTotal >= 1000m/orderTotal > 1000m/'

run_mutation "M2:  >= 500 → > 500  (off-by-one at mid tier)" \
  's/orderTotal >= 500m/orderTotal > 500m/'

run_mutation "M3:  >= 100 → > 100  (off-by-one at low tier)" \
  's/orderTotal >= 100m/orderTotal > 100m/'

run_mutation "M4:  0.15 → 0.16  (wrong percentage top tier)" \
  's/0\.15m/0.16m/'

run_mutation "M5:  0.10 → 0.11  (wrong percentage mid tier)" \
  's/0\.10m/0.11m/'

run_mutation "M6:  0.05 → 0.06  (wrong percentage low tier)" \
  's/0\.05m/0.06m/'

run_mutation "M7:  >= 1000 → >= 999  (boundary shift)" \
  's/orderTotal >= 1000m/orderTotal >= 999m/'

run_mutation "M8:  < 0 → <= 0  (zero becomes invalid)" \
  's/orderTotal < 0/orderTotal <= 0/'

echo ""
echo "=== CalculateShipping mutations ==="
run_mutation "M9:  > 250 → >= 250  (free shipping boundary)" \
  's/orderTotal > 250m/orderTotal >= 250m/'

run_mutation "M10: > 250 → > 251  (off-by-one free shipping)" \
  's/orderTotal > 250m/orderTotal > 251m/'

run_mutation "M11: > 10.0 → >= 10.0  (heavy fee boundary)" \
  's/weightKg > 10\.0/weightKg >= 10.0/'

run_mutation "M12: > 10.0 → > 11.0  (raise heavy threshold)" \
  's/weightKg > 10\.0/weightKg > 11.0/'

run_mutation "M13: 15.00 → 20.00  (wrong heavy fee)" \
  's/baseCost += 15\.00m/baseCost += 20.00m/'

run_mutation "M14: *= 1.50 → *= 1.25  (wrong express multiplier)" \
  's/baseCost \*= 1\.50m/baseCost *= 1.25m/'

run_mutation "M15: remove express surcharge entirely" \
  '/baseCost \*= 1\.50m/d'

echo ""
echo "=== ApplyCoupon mutations ==="
run_mutation "M16: < 1.00 → < 0  (floor removed effectively)" \
  's/result < 1\.00m/result < 0m/'

run_mutation "M17: 1.00 floor → 0.01 floor" \
  's/? 1\.00m/? 0.01m/'

run_mutation "M18: FLAT50 discount → 40.00 instead of 50.00" \
  's/"FLAT50" => 50\.00m/"FLAT50" => 40.00m/'

run_mutation "M19: unknown coupon → 5.00 instead of 0" \
  's/_ => 0m/_ => 5.00m/'

run_mutation "M20: SAVE20 → 0.25 instead of 0.20" \
  's/0\.20m/0.25m/'

# Restore original
cp /tmp/original.cs PricingEngine/DiscountCalculator.cs
